Every day I am falling in love with you. More and more.
The fun I have with you is unmatched!
Dad, I found the one! She is the one!
It's so fun and calm to live with you.
In all dimensions—you just make me more of who I am.
Sad days, good days, bad days—we can face and go through them together. We can sit at every base together while we journey this trek.
You show me a happier version of myself. You bring the kid in me alive and let that kid run around with a free mind.
I have immense trust in you. In the millions and billions, how did we find each other, my love!
I cannot love you fully, when I don’t love myself fully.
I can run back to you, every day!
